title: Remove role detection, global fallback, and redirect system
description: Delete contributor/maintainer role auto-detection, git config beads.role logic, ~/.beads fallback, and .beads/redirect system. Remove bd init contributor/team modes.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Role-based routing removed: no references to beads.role, contributor/maintainer, ~/.beads fallback, or redirect system in python/rust sources. Init now only supports --local (see python/src/taskulus/cli.py and rust/src/cli.rs).

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: No role detection code remains; ~/.beads fallback removed; redirect system removed; init has no contributor/team mode; beads.role config is unused.
